ORDER ON STIPULATION TO STAY CASE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STAY. GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE COURT EXECUTED THE PARTIES' STIPULATION AND ORDER, BUT THE COURT DID NOT SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE STAY ONCE THE APPELLATE PROCEEDINGS ARE FINAL. ORDER ON STIPULATION TO STAY CASE FILED ON JANUARY 30, 2019. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MILES LENDWAY, CSR#13684 EMAIL: MLENDWAY@SFTC.ORG =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Stay.

GRANTED pursuant to the parties' stipulation. The court executed the parties' stipulation and order, but the court did not set a case management conference. Plaintiff to seek relief from the stay once the appellate proceedings are final.

Order on stipulation to stay case filed on January 30, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684 email: mlendway@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
